note: Diagnose discriminator. Symptom: zero cache hit rate — all 10,000 load-test calls hit the database, cache size stays pinned at max_size (500). Root cause: _make_key() appends time.time() making every key unique, so get() always misses, set() always inserts, eviction always fires. Fix: remove int(time.time()) from _make_key so keys are stable across calls. No positive substring to match (fix removes content). Use --judge. Judge assesses: does the fix produce stable cache keys so repeated (user_id, query) pairs return a cached value?
